reviews.comment:
Buen y cálido servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Good and friendly service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPdjhHOXpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Pese a ser socio del ACA y que cargué nafta Infinia y NO gasoil, debido a la patente de Paraguay q tiene mi auto me cobraron un precio superior. Creo que fue en ese momento $240 en lugar de $161 aprox. Lamentable

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Despite being an ACA member and filling up with Infinia gasoline and NOT diesel, they charged me a higher price because my car has Paraguayan license plates. I think it was $240 instead of approximately $161. Disappointing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbjVHZldREAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Te atienden como su fueras a pedirle un favor, no como si fueras un cliente.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. They treat you like you're asking them for a favor, not like a customer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMjVhUGpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy complicado todo. Le falta wifi 50 megas mínimo, avisar que estás en la cola que NO tiene Infinia, me comí media hora y cuando me toca me dicen en el otro surtidor es y anda al fondo de la cola otra vez! Estación de qué es? Falta mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
Everything is so complicated. They need at least 50 Mbps Wi-Fi, and they warn you that you're in the queue that doesn't have Infinia data. I wasted half an hour, and when it was finally my turn, they told me it was at the other pump, and I had to go to the back of the queue again! What kind of station is this? It needs improvement.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPell5QkNREAE

reviews.comment:
Atención amable, rápida , sanitarios en condiciones y se puede comprar algo para seguir camino.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena tiene todos los servicios baño limpios. Los precios del candy por el sol no por las nubes. Carisimo

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good, all amenities were available, and the bathrooms were clean. The prices at the candy counter were reasonable, not exorbitant. Very expensive.
